title: Hāra Gebeya Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Hāra Gebeya with a Z-Score of +3.49. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Hāra Gebeya is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 26%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is moderate at 10.4 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) forecasted, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
